goals.display: Deliver a special trophy to the Stash

_notes: Live-ops manifest (task 20, FR-20-6). Read directly as a raw Dictionary by LiveOps (game/systems/live/LiveOps.gd) — NOT hydrated into a typed def — so its nested arrays/objects load cleanly and the whole file is directly swappable for a fetched remote manifest later (remote-tolerant, no networking now). modifier_rotation.slots is a ring: index = floor((now-epoch)/86400/period_days) % slots.size(); an empty slot is a calm week (no global modifier). Seasons are [start_unix, start_unix+duration_days) windows; goal.kind in contracts_completed | take_secured | special_loot | legacy_earned, all already tracked. Modifiers/archetypes referenced here must exist as content (validated at author time). Keep modifiers stealth-viable — denser/harder, never forcing loud (grounded stealth focus).
